title: sloanea geniculata
intro: Sloanea geniculata, also known as the Bintangor tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Borneo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and polyphenol compounds. The health benefits of Sloanea geniculata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and is also used in traditional remedies for various health conditions.
